name: Eggplant Mozzarella
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, cook green onion and mushrooms in 1/4 cup water until tender.
3. Add spaghetti sauce; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
4. Sprinkle salt over sliced eggplant; set aside to drain for about 10 minutes.
5. In a shallow bowl, beat egg white and water together.
6. Dip each slice of eggplant in the egg mixture, then into flour.
7. Heat a few drops of olive oil over medium heat in a large non-stick skillet.
8. Add eggplant slices one at a time and cook until browned, turning once. Drain on paper towels.
9. In a 13-inch x 9-inch casserole dish, spread about 1/2 cup sauce.
10. Add a layer of eggplant, top with 1/2 cup cottage cheese and more sauce. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, ending with sauce.
11. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
12. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes.
